roa.docketEntryComment: ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT PER PC 1473,7 FILED,
DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA & VACATE PRIOR JUDGMENT &CONVICTION FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 10-12-90 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEASTO COUNT 2, A VIOLATION OF VC SECTION 23152(A) AND COUNT 6, A VIOLATION OFHS SECTION 11352 ON 09-11-90 ARE VACATED AND NEW PLEAS OF NOT GUILTY ARE ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 7 , A MISDEMEANOR VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 7/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/TWS/CH7:CJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE DEEMED PAID IN FULL/DISM3/NUNCDAT: 10-12-90/X: NO ORDER WAS SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE AND FILING,/
/CAL:TO SET MTR PROCEEDINGS (JUDGE CONROY RECUSED ON 01-31-18)/X:PAMELA HERZIG APPEARED FOR THE DEFENDANT,/DAWT/CONTD:HEARING ON MOTION TO VACATE PLEA
/CAL: FORTHWITH FROM D22/CONTD: FURTHER PROCEEDINGS AND TO SET MTR HEARING/DAWF/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWR: 07-16-91/BWR1/X:JUDGE CONROY RECUSED HIMSELF/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 23/TRANS 23:FORTHWITH FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS/
SPAN INT SW;AMENDED COMPL FILED ADDING CT6 11352HS/F;A/JWV;ISS3YPROB1YCJ;CTS60D;W/S;REG11590HS;DT&C;NODRG W/ORX;$100RF;$50LF;$25PC;ACCPT PROB
FOP, 180 DYS LIC RESTRICTION, OBEY ALL LAWS
CERTIFIED TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENTENCE
CONFLICT DECLARED BY PD, GOOD CAUSE FOUND TO CONT PX
